/portfolio/images/xsr/street-parked.jpg: A silver and black Yamaha XSR motorcycle, with a helmet marked "KANAK JR" resting on its rear seat, is parked on a paved street. Trees and buildings line the background, with other vehicles visible further down the road.
/portfolio/images/xsr/beach-ride.jpg: A motorcyclist, clad in a helmet and blue jacket, sits atop their bike on a wide sandy beach. The motorcycle, loaded with a travel bag, faces the ocean with a dense treeline bordering the sand.
/portfolio/images/xsr/office-parking.jpg: A silver and black Yamaha XSR motorcycle is parked on a tiled outdoor area, alongside a long, arched covered walkway that recedes into the background. Modern buildings are visible under a bright sky, completing the urban setting.
/portfolio/images/xsr/ruins-backdrop.jpg: A silver and black Yamaha XSR motorcycle, loaded with a rear luggage bag, is parked on sandy ground before a weathered brick wall with empty window frames, all beneath a clear blue sky.
/portfolio/images/xsr/coastal-sunset.jpg: A Yamaha XSR motorcycle, loaded with a large black bag, is parked on a reddish-brown dirt path overlooking the ocean. A small, orange sun is visible low in the hazy sky above the water, creating a soft, warm glow.
/portfolio/images/xsr/hilltop-stop.jpg: A silver-tanked Yamaha XSR motorcycle, equipped with a helmet and rear luggage, is parked on an asphalt road next to a black and white striped concrete barrier. Beyond a chain-link fence, hazy mountains rise under a bright sky, with green foliage on the right.
/portfolio/images/xsr/park-dappled-light: A sleek silver and black Yamaha XSR motorcycle is parked on an asphalt surface, set against a backdrop of concrete steps, a tree, and a blurred modern building.
/portfolio/images/3d_prints/first-prints: White desk accessories, including a 3D printed Benchy, a deburring tool, an Xbox controller, and a Tapo smart device, are neatly arranged on a light-colored surface. A keyboard and other electronics are visible in the background.
/portfolio/images/3d_prints/cup-holder.j: A black Starbucks tumbler sits in a custom 3D printed cup holder, featuring a white outer shell and an orange interior with a triangular lattice pattern. The holder is clamped to the side of a white desk.
